title: OACP Error Result
description: Structured error returned when message processing fails. Carries the reserved error code from the relevant section's error code registry.

errorCode.description: Reserved error code per spec sections (e.g., MESSAGE_TENANT_VIOLATION, BINDING_INVALID, PROPOSAL_INVALID).

errorMessage.description: Human-readable message; not security-sensitive (does not leak tenant data).

gateStep.description: Which step of the §1.2 processing gate produced the error.

violatingField.description: Optional JSON pointer to the field that triggered the error.
